# Linear Models that Classify: Logistic and Softmax {#sec-02-logistic-softmax}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*The same linear machinery, pushed through a squashing function, classifies. Sigmoid inverts the logit; softmax turns scores into a distribution; cross-entropy scores it. All from maximum likelihood.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/1L-2_softmax.tex`
transcripts:
- `m01_lecture-1-from-linear-regression-to-neural-netwo_-bdoWPWjyTc.txt`
-->
